summary.scope_note: Feasibility of operator mechanics only. Distinguishes H_C, H_HALO, H_G, H_0 cleanly; H_E/H_R/H_S only partially without transplanting a standardized environment onto the core. No storage result computed.

comoving_causal_halo.note: influence-decay halo + static footprint; feeding-blind; H_HALO operational definition. Front speed reported separately.
